meta.title: Best Time to Book — Flight Price History
meta.description: See historical flight prices to decide when to book. Track price trends for any route and find the cheapest day to fly.

navbar.brand: ✈ Best Time to Fly and Book

home.title: When is the best time to book your flight?
home.subtitle: See how flight prices for your route change over time. Pick a destination and travel date, then track price trends to decide whether to book now or wait.
home.guideTitle: How to Find the Best Time to Book
home.guideDesc: Track how flight prices for a specific departure date change over time. This helps you decide whether to book now or wait for a better deal.
home.findBestTime: Find the Best Time to Book
home.findBestTimeDesc: Select your route and travel date, then view the price trend. If prices are trending down, you may want to wait. If they're rising, consider booking soon.
home.monitorDropsDesc: Check back daily — each new snapshot adds a point to the chart. You'll see exactly when prices dropped and by how much.
home.compareDatesDesc: Try different departure dates to see how shifting your trip by a day or two affects the price history and current fare.
home.noDataDesc: We haven't collected price data for {date} yet. Data is gathered once a day — check back tomorrow!
home.noChecks: No searches yet — pick a route and travel date to get started.

explore.title: Which departure date is cheapest?
explore.subtitle: Compare average prices across different travel dates to find the cheapest day to fly your route.
explore.guideTitle: How to Find the Cheapest Day to Fly
explore.guideDesc: Browse average prices for every departure date we have data on. Spot the cheapest seasons and days for your route at a glance.
explore.cheapestSeasonDesc: Scan the chart for the lowest points on the line — those are the departure dates with the lowest average prices. Plan your trip around those periods.
explore.holidaySpikesDesc: Notice price bumps around holidays like Christmas or summer. The chart makes it obvious when demand (and prices) peak so you can avoid those windows.
explore.multipleSnapshotsDesc: Each departure date point is the average of all snapshots collected for that date. More snapshots mean a more reliable price signal.
explore.noDataDesc: We haven't collected enough data for this route yet. Data is gathered once a day — check back soon!
explore.noChecks: No searches yet — pick a route to get started.

routePicker.noDataCollected: No price data collected for this route yet.

priceChart.noDataDesc: Select a route and departure date to view price trend.

exploreChart.noDataDesc: Select a route and date to explore prices.
